data.body: CHECKPOINT: Read config-paths.sh, compute-diff-hash.sh, read-config.sh, and tests. Plan: replace 6 individual _cfg_read subprocess calls with a single read-config.sh --batch invocation. Batch mode outputs all keys as UPPER_CASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES=value lines (eval-safe). Map keys: PATHS_APP_DIR, INTERPRETER_PYTHON_VENV, FORMAT_SOURCE_DIRS, MERGE_VISUAL_BASELINE_PATH, PATHS_SRC_DIR, PATHS_TEST_DIR. Keep _cfg_read/_cfg_read_list as fallback functions for backward compat. Guard against no config file (batch returns empty → all defaults). Need to handle list mode (format.source_dirs) specially since batch outputs single-line but we need newline-separated.
